tools.name: solidworks_assembly_diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose an assembly inspect report: fixed/floating state, mate graph gaps, bad mates, isolated/no-mate components, bbox spacing, standard-part attachment, and lock-file hints.

tools.name: solidworks_assembly_repair_plan
tools.description: Build a read-only local repair plan from an assembly diagnosis JSON: bad mate resolution order, hostless standard-part host suggestions, and isolated-component intent questions.

tools.name: solidworks_assembly_review_pipeline
tools.description: Run the read-only assembly review pipeline from one inspect report and write diagnosis, interface index, repair plan, mate group plan, and manifest artifacts.

tools.name: solidworks_audit
tools.description: Run the offline verification gate for this SolidWorks Codex toolchain.

tools.name: solidworks_backup
tools.description: Create timestamped backups of .SLDPRT/.SLDASM/.SLDDRW files before modification.

tools.name: solidworks_backup_status
tools.description: Inspect a backup report and classify source files as unchanged, changed, missing, or restorable.

tools.name: solidworks_change_plan
tools.description: Generate a flexible evidence-first mechanical CAD change plan from an inspect JSON report and natural-language goal.

tools.name: solidworks_change_verify
tools.description: Verify a compare delta contains only expected dimensions, component changes, additions/removals, or feature type count changes.

tools.name: solidworks_compare_reports
tools.description: Compare two SolidWorks Codex inspect JSON reports.

tools.name: solidworks_component_insert
tools.description: Insert a reviewed .SLDPRT/.SLDASM component into the active or specified assembly with origin/config/fixed-state evidence.

tools.name: solidworks_component_state
tools.description: Change assembly component state by Component2.Name2: hide/show/suppress/unsuppress/fix/float.

tools.name: solidworks_design_review
tools.description: Generate a generic evidence-first mechanical CAD review from an inspect JSON report: findings, open questions, and candidate actions.

tools.name: solidworks_engineering_lite
tools.description: Generate a read-only engineering-lite BOM, material, DFM, and DFA review from inspect evidence.

tools.name: solidworks_existing_mcp_tools
tools.description: List tools exposed by installed npm solidworks-mcp-server in mock mode.

tools.name: solidworks_export
tools.description: Export active or specified SolidWorks document to target path. Format follows suffix.

tools.name: solidworks_feature_state
tools.description: Change part or assembly feature state by feature name: suppress/unsuppress/delete or set a feature-scoped dimension, then rebuild and report before/after evidence.

tools.name: solidworks_finalize
tools.description: Generate the final readiness Markdown/JSON report after running audit.

tools.name: solidworks_handoff_bundle
tools.description: Create a compact handoff bundle with inspect JSON, context pack, worklog summary, README, and manifest.

tools.name: solidworks_inspect
tools.description: Deep read-only inspect of active part/assembly: features, dimensions, components.

tools.name: solidworks_interface_index
tools.description: Build a read-only heuristic component/interface index from an inspect report: bbox contact candidates, nearest neighbors, standard-part hints, and root/suppression role hints.

tools.name: solidworks_interference_check
tools.description: Run conservative SolidWorks assembly interference detection and emit JSON.

tools.name: solidworks_issue_report
tools.description: Generate a practical issue/recommendation report from an inspect JSON report.

tools.name: solidworks_mass_properties
tools.description: Report mass properties for active or specified SolidWorks document.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_execute
tools.description: Execute reviewed mate group selector evidence in the active SolidWorks assembly using SelectByID2, AddMate5, and immediate rebuild. dry_run only plans selector actions.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_execution_check
tools.description: Check after-inspect evidence for mate group macro execution: expected named mates exist, are unsuppressed, and report no solver/API errors.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_live_protocol
tools.description: Generate a controlled per-group live SolidWorks work order for reviewed mate group macros: backup, selection evidence, macro run, rebuild, inspect, execution check, interference, and cleanup.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_macro
tools.description: Generate reviewable preselect VBA macro drafts from a mate group plan. Each macro still requires live entity preselection and review before running.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_plan
tools.description: Build a read-only mate group plan from an assembly repair plan and interface index: grouped candidate mates, components, evidence, and per-group verification.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_group_validate
tools.description: Validate a read-only mate group plan before macro or live execution: component count, supported mate types, and required rebuild/mate-error verification.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_macro
tools.description: Generate reviewable VBA macro for adding a mate between two preselected entities.

tools.name: solidworks_mate_selection_check
tools.description: Validate current selection-report evidence against a mate macro manifest before running a reviewed mate macro: exactly two supported entity selections on expected components.

tools.name: solidworks_metadata_execute
tools.description: Execute reviewed material and custom-property metadata writes for active or specified SolidWorks models.

tools.name: solidworks_model_understand
tools.description: Build a compact task-scoped model understanding pack from an inspect report: baseline facts, relevant CAD objects, relationship hypotheses, risks, and next minimal queries.

tools.name: solidworks_motion_sweep_lite
tools.description: Execute or dry-run sampled mechanism driver positions against executable mate evidence, rebuild each sample, and block collisions/dead layouts.

tools.name: solidworks_offline_demo
tools.description: Generate a 5-minute offline demo bundle for GitHub readers without requiring SolidWorks to be open.

tools.name: solidworks_part_feature_execute
tools.description: Execute a reviewed part feature spec in SolidWorks: extrude cuts, basic/countersink/counterbore holes, slot cuts, pocket cuts, fillet, chamfer, linear pattern, circular pattern, or mirror with named feature/entity selectors.

tools.name: solidworks_part_geometry_validate
tools.description: Validate part inspect readback against a geometry contract: body count, bbox, volume, required features, semantic feature counts, and interface evidence.

tools.name: solidworks_preflight
tools.description: Run deterministic environment/toolchain preflight before touching a real SolidWorks model.

tools.name: solidworks_probe
tools.description: Read-only attach to an already-running SolidWorks instance and summarize active document.

tools.name: solidworks_rebuild
tools.description: Rebuild active or specified SolidWorks document; optionally save.

tools.name: solidworks_report_context
tools.description: Build a freeform handoff/context pack from an inspect report: inventory, risks, anchors, and next commands.

tools.name: solidworks_report_search
tools.description: Search an inspect JSON report for components, dimensions, and features by text/state when names are messy.

tools.name: solidworks_report_summary
tools.description: Summarize a SolidWorks Codex JSON probe/inspect report into Markdown.

tools.name: solidworks_restore_backup
tools.description: Dry-run or apply restoration from a SolidWorks Codex backup report. apply=false only validates and plans.

tools.name: solidworks_safe_set_dimension
tools.description: Run a guarded one-dimension edit pipeline: backup, inspect, set dimension, rebuild, inspect, compare, and verify only that dimension changed.

tools.name: solidworks_selection_report
tools.description: Report current SolidWorks selection set for safe preselected-entity mate workflows.

tools.name: solidworks_session_snapshot
tools.description: Create a work-session package: inspect JSON, summary Markdown, issue report, manifest.

tools.name: solidworks_set_dimension
tools.description: Set one SolidWorks dimension by full parameter name. Value is SystemValue in meters. Use save only after backup.

tools.name: solidworks_start_inspect
tools.description: Allow COM launch of SolidWorks, then run deep read-only inspect.

tools.name: solidworks_start_probe
tools.description: Allow COM launch of SolidWorks, then summarize active document.

tools.name: solidworks_template_macro
tools.description: Generate reviewable VBA macro for common mechanical part templates such as sleeve, spacer, flange, endcap, adapter, and retainer.

tools.name: solidworks_tool_catalog
tools.description: Generate a grouped catalog of all SolidWorks Codex MCP tools and when to use them.

tools.name: solidworks_worklog
tools.description: Append a durable worklog event for multi-turn decisions, assumptions, verification, failures, and next steps.

operator_notes: Do not blindly replay templates: inspect the current report, context, worklog, and handoff artifacts before choosing a tool.
Before write operations, create a backup; change one variable at a time; then rebuild, inspect, and compare.
Use handoff-bundle for pauses, session changes, and review handoff; use audit/finalize as release gates.
